meta.title: BTech — Transforming Ideas Into Digital Experiences
meta.description: BTech is a digital solutions agency crafting modern websites, web applications, branding, and marketing materials.

hero.headline: We Build Digital Experiences That Grow Your Business.
hero.subtitle: Websites, Web Apps, Branding, Logos, Graphic Design & Digital Marketing — everything your business needs to stand out.

about.title: We build digital identities businesses can be proud of.
about.description: BTech is a digital solutions agency helping businesses of every size establish a powerful, trustworthy presence online and offline. We combine strategy, design, and engineering to turn ideas into experiences people remember.
about.mission: Our mission is simple: give every client the digital identity of a much bigger brand — without the complexity.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.description: Original design thinking tailored to your brand, never templates.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Modern technology stacks built for performance and longevity.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.description: Clear communication and reliable delivery, every step of the way.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Meticulous attention to detail across design and code.

support.title: Long-term Support
support.description: We stay by your side well beyond launch day.

2019.title: BTech is founded
2019.description: Started as a two-person studio with a passion for great design.

2021.title: Web applications division
2021.description: Expanded into custom dashboards, booking systems, and business software.

2023.title: Branding & print studio
2023.description: Launched a dedicated branding and graphic design department.

2025.title: Restaurant & hospitality suite
2025.description: Introduced digital menu, QR ordering, and hospitality branding solutions.

services.title: Services built to move your business forward.
services.subtitle: From first sketch to final pixel, we cover every discipline your digital presence needs.

web-applications.description: Custom dashboards, booking systems, CRM and ERP software.

testimonials.title: Trusted by ambitious businesses.
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it — hear from the clients we've worked with.

technologies.title: Technologies we use to build the future.
technologies.subtitle: A modern, battle-tested toolkit chosen for performance, reliability, and scale.

timeline.question: How long does a typical project take?
timeline.answer: Most websites launch in 2–4 weeks, while web applications typically take 6–12 weeks depending on complexity.

cost.question: How much does a website cost?
cost.answer: Pricing depends on scope and features. After a short discovery call, we provide a transparent, fixed-price quote.

revisions.title: revisions
revisions.question: How many revisions are included?
revisions.answer: Every package includes structured revision rounds at each stage of the process, so you always have input.

support.question: Do you offer support after launch?
support.answer: Yes. We offer ongoing maintenance, hosting, and feature-development packages after your project goes live.

technologies.question: What technologies do you work with?
technologies.answer: We build with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern databases, chosen based on your project's specific needs.

contact.title: Let's build something great together.
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and our team will get back to you within one business day.
